name: Air Raid Cover
descriptionTemplate: When commanding an airforce unit to attack, there is X% rate that our inactive units that are 1 grid around the enemy unit under attack will join the attack (up to 1 troop will participate simultaneously).

progression.renderedDesc: When commanding an airforce unit to attack, there is 10% rate that our inactive units that are 1 grid around the enemy unit under attack will join the attack (up to 1 troop will participate simultaneously).
progression.renderedDescFr: When commanding an aviation unité to attaque, there is 10% rate that our inactive unités that are 1 grid around the unités ennemies under attaque will join the attaque (up to 1 troop will participate simultaneously).

descriptionTemplateFr: When commanding an aviation unité to attaque, there is X% rate that our inactive unités that are 1 grid around the unités ennemies under attaque will join the attaque (up to 1 troop will participate simultaneously).
longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Couverture anti-aérienne » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « When commanding an aviation unité to attaque, there is 50% rate that our inactive unités that are 1 grid around the unités ennemies under attaque will join the attaque (up to 1 troop will participate simultaneously). ». Compétence signature liée à une carte précise, à niveauer quand on investit dans ce général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Air Raid Cover" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "When commanding an airforce unit to attack, there is 50% rate that our inactive units that are 1 grid around the enemy unit under attack will join the attack (up to 1 troop will participate simultaneously).". A signature tied to a specific card, worth levelling whenever you invest in that general.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Air Raid Cover“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „When commanding an airforce unit to attack, there is 50% rate that our inactive units that are 1 grid around the enemy unit under attack will join the attack (up to 1 troop will participate simultaneously).“. Eine an eine bestimmte Karte gebundene Signatur, die beim Investieren geleveled werden sollte.
